title: Briefing on SpaceX Stock Price Movements
description: Recent reports discuss short sellers, a drop in stock price, and the impact of an aborted Starship launch on Elon Musk's fortune.

sources.title: SpaceX Stock: Why Short Sellers Are Piling On
Why Did SpaceX Stock Drop Again on Monday?
Musk’s Fortune Falls Under $800 Billion After Aborted Starship Launch

sections.heading: Short Seller Activity
paragraphs: According to Barron's, short sellers are piling on SpaceX stock.

sections.heading: Recent Price Performance
paragraphs: Yahoo Finance reported that the stock price dropped again on Monday, raising questions about the causes of the decline.

sections.heading: Impact on Executive Wealth
paragraphs: Forbes reported that Elon Musk's fortune has fallen below $800 billion. This decrease follows an aborted Starship launch.

sections.heading: Search Interest Data
paragraphs: Google Trends data indicates a search volume lower bound of 2,000 for the term "spacex stock price" in the US region as of July 20, 2026. Google Trends is a tool that analyzes the popularity of top search queries in Google Search across various regions and languages.

faq.q: What is the sentiment from short sellers?
faq.a: Barron's reports that short sellers are piling on SpaceX stock.

faq.q: Did the stock price drop recently?
faq.a: Yes, Yahoo Finance reported that the stock dropped again on Monday.

faq.q: How has the aborted launch affected Elon Musk?
faq.a: According to Forbes, his fortune fell under $800 billion after the aborted Starship launch.
